description: Shared definitions for the EmDash plugin registry aggregator XRPC endpoints. EXPERIMENTAL: shape may change before stabilisation.

packageView.description: An aggregator's view of a package, hydrating a profile record with denormalized metadata, mirror URLs for the latest release's primary artifact, and any labels applied by trusted labelers the aggregator hydrates.

uri.description: AT URI of the profile record the aggregator indexed. Pins exactly which record version this view describes.

cid.description: CID of the profile record content the aggregator indexed. Lets clients confirm they're working with the same bytes the aggregator did.

did.description: Publisher DID. Denormalised convenience; equivalent to the DID portion of `uri`.

slug.description: Package slug (the rkey of the profile record). Denormalised convenience.

handle.description: Publisher's current handle, if known. Best-effort: handles are mutable and may be stale at the moment of read.

profile.description: The signed profile record verbatim, passed through from the publisher's repo (carrying its $type, all required fields, etc.).

latestVersion.description: Convenience: the highest semver version among non-tombstoned, non-yanked releases the aggregator has indexed for this package. Clients SHOULD verify this against their own selection from listReleases when the difference matters.

indexedAt.description: When the aggregator first indexed this package.

labels.description: Hydrated labels applying to this package, per the labelers the request asked for via the atproto-accept-labelers header.

publisherView.description: An aggregator's view of a publisher: the signed publisher.profile record verbatim (identity-level contact channels, display name), denormalised metadata for display, and any labels applied to the publisher DID by trusted labelers the aggregator hydrates.

uri.description: AT URI of the publisher.profile record the aggregator indexed (rkey is always 'self'). Pins exactly which record version this view describes.

cid.description: CID of the profile record content the aggregator indexed. Lets clients confirm they're working with the same bytes the aggregator did.

did.description: Publisher DID. Denormalised convenience; equivalent to the DID portion of `uri`.

handle.description: Publisher's current handle, if known. Best-effort: handles are mutable and may be stale at the moment of read.

profile.description: The signed publisher.profile record verbatim, passed through from the publisher's repo (carrying its $type, displayName, contact channels, etc.).

indexedAt.description: When the aggregator first indexed this publisher.

labels.description: Hydrated labels applying to this publisher DID, per the labelers the request asked for via the atproto-accept-labelers header.

releaseView.description: An aggregator's view of a release: the signed record verbatim, the mirror URLs the aggregator is currently serving the primary artifact from, and any hydrated labels.

uri.description: AT URI of the release record the aggregator indexed. Pins exactly which record version this view describes.

cid.description: CID of the release record content the aggregator indexed.

did.description: Publisher DID. Denormalised convenience; equivalent to the DID portion of `uri`.

version.description: Release version, matching the post-':' portion of the rkey.

release.description: The signed release record verbatim from the publisher's repo (carrying its $type and all fields).

mirrors.description: URLs the aggregator currently serves the primary `package` artifact from. Empty if the aggregator did not mirror this release (e.g. license is non-redistributable). The URL shape is opaque per the aggregator; clients treat them as-is and verify checksums on download.

indexedAt.description: When the aggregator first indexed this release.

labels.description: Hydrated labels applying to this release, per the labelers the request asked for.

verificationClaimView.description: One verification claim the aggregator has indexed for a subject: an issuer DID vouching for the subject as a trusted publisher, bound to the subject's handle and publisher-profile displayName at issuance. Whether the claim is currently in force (handle and displayName still match, and it has not expired) is a read-time concern; this view reports the facts as indexed.

issuer.description: DID of the repo that issued the verification.

displayName.description: Subject publisher-profile displayName bound at issuance.

expiresAt.description: Optional expiry. Absent means no automatic expiry.

indexedAt.description: When the aggregator first indexed this verification.

publisherVerificationView.description: An aggregator's view of the verification state indexed for a publisher DID: the non-tombstoned verification claims naming it as subject. Claims are returned regardless of expiry — the caller evaluates in-force state from each claim's `expiresAt`. An empty `verifications` array means the DID has no indexed claims (an unverified publisher), or every claim's issuer is redacted for this caller — distinct from NotFound, which means the subject DID itself is redacted.

did.description: Subject publisher DID the verification state is for.

verifications.description: Non-tombstoned verification claims naming this DID as subject, newest issuance first.

labels.description: Hydrated labels applying to this publisher DID, per the labelers the request asked for via the atproto-accept-labelers header.
